action.reasoning: Observation: We have ~9.3 minutes and 10 iterations left. The best-ever eval score is rmse_z500=1018.63 from iteration 5. We have fresh per-epoch checkpoints from iteration 19 (run_epoch1-5.pt). Epoch 5 has the lowest validation loss (0.1173) among them. Since eval takes only ~20-50 seconds, we can efficiently test multiple checkpoints. Analysis: The retrained model with lower val loss (0.109) scored worse on test (1032), suggesting val-test correlation is imperfect. Therefore, testing multiple epochs from the same training run is worthwhile. Decision: Start by evaluating run_epoch5.pt. If it does not beat 1018, we will test other epochs (e.g., epoch 2 or 4) in subsequent iterations.
